articles.title: America’s crude inventories are getting perilously low. But that’s not the full story. - MarketWatch
articles.description: ‘You have a buffer getting close to not being a buffer anymore,’ analyst says
articles.content: There are growing worries that U.S. commercial oil inventories are too low for comfort as the war with Iran enters its fourth month far from a clear resolution and a lot hinges on how much longer the… [+406 chars]

articles.title: Park ranger dies after falling into crevasse on America's tallest peak - CBS News
articles.description: The National Park Service said a ranger in Alaska fell into a crevasse and died on North America's tallest mountain.
articles.content:
A ranger in Alaska died after falling into a crevasse on North America's tallest mountain, the National Park Service said. 
Robin Pendery of Enumclaw, Washington, was a seasonal mountaineering range… [+1410 chars]
